name: Explosive Charge
talentDescription: Shooting for 3 seconds enhances the next Skill for 8 seconds. Dealing damage with the Enhanced Skill creates an explosion with a radius of 5 meters around it that deals damage equal to 1600% Engineering.
imageAlt: Explosive Charge OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Engineering gear mod with orange glow effect and engineering class icon

name: Collateral Damage
talentDescription: When dealing Skill Damage, also deal damage equal to 3000% Engineering to enemies within 5 meters of the target.
imageAlt: Collateral Damage OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Engineering gear mod with glow effect and engineering class icon

name: Tactical Layering
talentDescription: Deploying a Skill grants +15% Engineering, up to 3 stacks.
imageAlt: Tactical Layering OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Relentless Assault
talentDescription: For every 1 shots fired, grants +1.30% Weapon Damage for 5 seconds, up to 30 stacks. Loses 2 stacks per second.
imageAlt: Relentless Assault OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Critical Damage gear mod with glow effect and skill critical damage class icon

name: Strategic Assistance
talentDescription: Assists grant +4.80% Signature Ability Charge Efficiency for 10 seconds and reduce Skill Cooldown by 2.40%, up to 5 stacks.
imageAlt: Strategic Assistance OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Rampart
talentDescription: While immobile, grants +5% Damage for 1 seconds, up to 6 stacks. This bonus resets upon moving.
imageAlt: Rampart OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Critical Chance gear mod with glow effect and skill critical chance class icon

name: Surgical Engineering
talentDescription: Skill Critical Hits have a 60% chance of granting +16% Skill Critical Damage for 10 seconds, up to 3 stacks.
imageAlt: Surgical Engineering OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Chain Reaction
talentDescription: Kills grant +7.50% Skill Intensity for 10 seconds, up to 2 stacks.
imageAlt: Chain Reaction OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Critical Chance gear mod with glow effect and skill critical chance class icon

name: Tactical Persistence
talentDescription: Skill Hits have a 20% chance of granting +3% Skill Intensity for 5 seconds, up to 5 stacks.
imageAlt: Tactical Persistence OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Critical Damage gear mod with glow effect and skill critical damage class icon

name: Recursive Treatment
talentDescription: Healing or granting Extra Health grants +20% Skill Intensity.
imageAlt: Recursive Treatment OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Engineering gear mod with glow effect and engineering class icon

name: Close and Personal
talentDescription: Grants +9% Engineering for each ally within 30 meters who possesses a buff that was granted by the Agent.
imageAlt: Close and Personal OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Chase the Weak
talentDescription: Dealing damage to debuffed enemies who are 20 meters away has a 10% chance of granting +7.50% Engineering for 10 seconds, up to 3 stacks.
imageAlt: Chase the Weak OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Together We Stand
talentDescription: Grants +9% Engineering for each ally within 20 meters.
imageAlt: Together We Stand OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Pressing Matter
talentDescription: Grants +10% Skill Cooldown Recovery.
imageAlt: Pressing Matter OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Ambusher
talentDescription: Being immobile for 3 seconds grants +22.50% Engineering.
imageAlt: Ambusher OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Cornered Animal
talentDescription: Grants Weapon Damage equal to 50% Skill Critical Damage when there are no more than 1 bullets in the magazine, capped at 100% Weapon Damage.
imageAlt: Cornered Animal OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Critical Damage gear mod with glow effect and skill critical damage class icon

name: Rocket Science
talentDescription: Deploying a Skill grants +14.40% Skill Critical Hit Chance for 10 seconds.

name: Applied Demolition
talentDescription: Deploying a Skill grants +24% Skill Critical Hit Damage for 10 seconds.
imageAlt: Applied Demolition OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Hardware Upgrade
talentDescription: Grants +24% Skill Critical Damage.
imageAlt: Hardware Upgrade OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Brains Over Brawn
talentDescription: Hits deal additional damage equal to 24% Engineering.
imageAlt: Brains Over Brawn OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Critical Chance gear mod with glow effect and skill critical chance class icon

name: Running Around
talentDescription: Grants +18% Engineering while located within 25 meters of a debuffed enemy.
imageAlt: Running Around OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Long-Range Artillery
talentDescription: Taking damage grants +12% Skill Intensity for 5 seconds.
imageAlt: Long-Range Artillery OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Engineering gear mod with glow effect and engineering class icon

name: Overclocking
talentDescription: Grants +9% Skill Multi-Shot Chance.
imageAlt: Overclocking OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Energizer
talentDescription: Grants +10.80% Skill Critical Chance.
imageAlt: Energizer OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Combat Doc
talentDescription: Grants +9% Healing Intensity.
imageAlt: Combat Doc OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Genius Engineer
talentDescription: Grants +9% Engineering and +4.80% Skill Duration.
imageAlt: Genius Engineer OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Inspiration
talentDescription: Grants +18% Signature Ability Charge Efficiency while located within 25 meters of an enemy.
imageAlt: Inspiration OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Hermit
talentDescription: Grants +18% Signature Ability Charge Efficiency when no enemies are within 20 meters.
imageAlt: Hermit OS Protocol in Division Resurgence showing the Skill Intensity gear mod with glow effect and skill intensity class icon

name: Explosive Round
talentDescription: Critical Hits performed during aiming create an explosion with a radius of 5 meters around the target that deals damage equal to 2000% Firepower to them.

name: Overwhelming Power
talentDescription: Shooting grants +6% Weapon Damage for 2 seconds, up to 6 stacks. Shooting for 2 seconds grants +50% Damage Reduction for 2 seconds.

name: Cover Shooter
talentDescription: Critical Hits behind cover have a 80% chance of granting +16% Weapon Critical Hit Damage for 5 seconds, up to 3 stacks.

name: Assault Charge
talentDescription: Deploying the Signature Ability grants +30% Firepower and +20% Rate of Fire for 20 seconds.

name: Concerted Strike
talentDescription: Skill Hits within 20 meters have a 100% chance of granting +8% Damage for 10 seconds, up to 3 stacks.

name: Tactical Pistolero
talentDescription: Skill Hits grant +4.50% Firepower for 10 seconds, up to 5 stacks.

name: Tight Grouping
talentDescription: Weapon Critical Hits behind cover have a 5% chance of granting +10% Weapon Critical Hit Damage for 5 seconds, up to 3 stacks.

name: Assisted Infantry
talentDescription: Shooting continuously grants +2.50% Weapon Damage every 1 seconds for 2 seconds, up to 6 stacks.

name: Pressure Cooker
talentDescription: When taking damage, grants +6% Weapon Critical Hit Chance for 10 seconds, up to 3 stacks.

name: Dominating Presence
talentDescription: Grants +5% Weapon Multi-Shot Chance for each enemy within 20 meters.

name: Augmented Lethality
talentDescription: Grants +4% Weapon Damage and +4% Incoming Healing for every 1 enemies who are within 20 meters.

name: Deadly Accuracy
talentDescription: Headshots grant +3.25% Firepower for 7 seconds, up to 10 stacks. Stacks disappear over time, but body shots and missed shots remove a stack instantly.

name: Mechanized Support
talentDescription: Grants +15% Weapon Damage while located within 20 meters of a deployed Skill.

name: Trench Fighter
talentDescription: Grants +30% Weapon Critical Hit Damage when behind cover.

name: Close Quarters Menace
talentDescription: Grants +15% Skill Intensity and Weapon Damage when there are enemies within 20 meters.

name: Combat Reload
talentDescription: Reloading grants +15% Weapon Damage for 5 seconds.

name: Death From Afar
talentDescription: Grants Firepower equal to 12% Headshot Damage, capped at 54% Firepower.

name: Hunting Season
talentDescription: Grants +6% Firepower while located within 30 meters of a debuffed enemy.

name: Side by Side
talentDescription: Grants +6% Firepower while located within 30 meters of a deployed Skill.

name: Suppressive Fire
talentDescription: Shooting grants +12% Weapon Damage.

name: Resentful
talentDescription: Taking damage grants +14.40% Weapon Critical Hit Chance for 5 seconds.

name: Face-to-Face Advantage
talentDescription: Grants +18% Firepower while located within 20 meters of an enemy.

name: War Machine
talentDescription: Grants +9% Weapon Damage.

name: Seasoned Veteran
talentDescription: Grants +13.50% Firepower.

name: Spray 'n' Pray
talentDescription: Grants +9% Weapon Multi-Shot Chance.

name: Pummeling Shield
talentDescription: While possessing Extra Health, apply Stun after every 10 hits performed. At Max Health, grants Extra Health equal to 2400% Firepower for 10 seconds when hit.

name: Heavy Armor
talentDescription: While possessing Extra Health, grants +14.40% Damage. Assists grant Extra Health equal to 16% Max Health for 10 seconds.

name: Happy Survival
talentDescription: Restore 0.50% Max Health for every 1 enemies within 10 meters, up to a maximum of 2.50%. Shooting consumes 2% Health and deals additional damage equal to 0.60% Current Health.

name: Blitz Tactics
talentDescription: Grants +12% Incoming Healing for each enemy within 20 meters who is targeting the Agent. Taking Weapon Damage restores 8% Max Health.

name: Last Resort
talentDescription: Grants +15% Toughness when an ally's Health reaches 50%, up to +100%.

name: Medical Excellence
talentDescription: Restoring the Health of any ally whose Health is above 50% of their Current Health grants the ally team additional healing equal to 5% Max Health. Restoring the Health of any ally whose Health is below 50% of their Current Health grants the target additional healing equal to 12.50% Max Health.

name: Level-Headed
talentDescription: Taking damage has a 30% chance of granting +36% Incoming Healing for 5 seconds.

name: Caretaker
talentDescription: Grants +12% Healing Intensity.

name: Enduring
talentDescription: Taking damage grants +10% Damage Reduction for 5 seconds.

name: Steadfast
talentDescription: Grants +18% Toughness while Health is above 50%.

name: Plate Carrier
talentDescription: Grants +21% Armor.

name: Layered Defense
talentDescription: Grants +4.50% Weapon Damage and +4.50% Stamina.

name: Physical Training
talentDescription: Grants +13.50% Toughness.
